TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Ksunu' = Gaga mniq Tawyuensu Fusingcyu ka alang Ksunu'. 71 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 245 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 94% niqan 231 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 6% niqan 14 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 89%, Amis 1%, Bunun 2%, Paiwan 1%, ni rahuq na o 1%.
S.PHON: = ksunu' = gaga mniq tawjuənsu *usiŋʦju ka alaŋ ksunu'. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tajal **%, amis *%, bunun *%, paiwan *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%.
S.FORM: = Ksunu' = Gaga mniq Tawyuensu Fusingcyu ka alang Ksunu'. 71 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 245 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 94% niqan 231 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 6% niqan 14 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 89%, Amis 1%, Bunun 2%, Paiwan 1%, ni rahuq na o 1%.
S.PHON: = ksunu' = gaga mniq tawjuənsu *usiŋʦju ka alaŋ ksunu'. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tajal **%, amis *%, bunun *%, paiwan *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%.
